member.name: T:HRLeavesManagement.Controllers.EmployeesController
member.summary: Employee lookup (single-user demo, but exposed for the UI selector).

member.name: M:HRLeavesManagement.Controllers.EmployeesController.GetAll
member.summary: Lists all employees.

member.name: T:HRLeavesManagement.Controllers.LeaveBalancesController
member.summary: Leave balances and accrual information per employee.

member.name: M:HRLeavesManagement.Controllers.LeaveBalancesController.GetSummary(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the per-type balances and total balance for an employee, including days accrued to date for accruing leave types.

member.name: T:HRLeavesManagement.Controllers.LeaveRequestsController
member.summary: Create, query and action employee leave requests.

member.name: M:HRLeavesManagement.Controllers.LeaveRequestsController.GetHistory(System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{LeaveStatus},System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Returns leave requests, optionally filtered by employee, status, type and date range.

member.name: M:HRLeavesManagement.Controllers.LeaveRequestsController.GetPending
member.summary: Returns all requests currently awaiting approval.

member.name: M:HRLeavesManagement.Controllers.LeaveRequestsController.CreateRequest(BusinessService.DTOs.LeaveSubmissionDto)
member.summary: Submits a new leave request after validating dates, overlaps and balance.

member.name: M:HRLeavesManagement.Controllers.LeaveRequestsController.SetApprovalStatus(System.Int32,BusinessService.DTOs.LeaveApprovalDto)
member.summary: Approves or rejects a single pending request. Deducts balance on approval.

member.name: M:HRLeavesManagement.Controllers.LeaveRequestsController.BulkApproval(BusinessService.DTOs.BulkApprovalDto)
member.summary: Approves or rejects multiple pending requests in one call.

member.name: M:HRLeavesManagement.Controllers.LeaveRequestsController.Cancel(System.Int32)
member.summary: Cancels a request, restoring the balance if it had already been approved.

member.name: T:HRLeavesManagement.Controllers.LeaveTypesController
member.summary: HR management of leave types (custom types with configurable defaults and accrual).

member.name: M:HRLeavesManagement.Controllers.LeaveTypesController.GetAll
member.summary: Lists all leave types (used to populate dropdowns and the HR management grid).

member.name: M:HRLeavesManagement.Controllers.LeaveTypesController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a single leave type by id.

member.name: M:HRLeavesManagement.Controllers.LeaveTypesController.Create(BusinessService.DTOs.UpsertLeaveTypeDto)
member.summary: Creates a new leave type.

member.name: M:HRLeavesManagement.Controllers.LeaveTypesController.Update(System.Int32,BusinessService.DTOs.UpsertLeaveTypeDto)
member.summary: Updates an existing leave type (including the IsAccrued toggle).

member.name: M:HRLeavesManagement.Controllers.LeaveTypesController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a leave type that is not referenced by any request or balance.

member.name: T:HRLeavesManagement.Controllers.SettlementsController
member.summary: Manual balance settlements (e.g. annual reset of unused vacation days) and their audit log.

member.name: M:HRLeavesManagement.Controllers.SettlementsController.Adjust(BusinessService.DTOs.SettlementDto)
member.summary: Applies a manual balance adjustment and records it in the settlement history.
member.response: Employee, leave type or balance not found.

member.name: M:HRLeavesManagement.Controllers.SettlementsController.GetHistory(System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Returns the (in-memory) settlement history, optionally filtered by employee.

member.name: T:HRLeavesManagement.Middleware.GlobalExceptionMiddleware
member.summary: Translates domain exceptions into consistent JSON error responses so controllers stay free of repetitive try/catch blocks.
